description: Case style: Silver toned rectangular case with a fixed bezel, crystal studded Dial style: White dial, white and silver hands Strap style: Pink strap with tang clasp Features: Logo at the 10-hour mark, screw to reset time, solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability, diamanté studded Water resistance up to 30 meters & ndash wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Warranty: 2 years from the date of purchase
